title: verbascum × neilreichii
intro: Verbascum × neilreichii, also known as the Neilreich's mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its tall stature and showy yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × neilreichii lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its dried roots and leaves are often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
